---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Use case**
<!-- What problem does this solve? What workflow does it improve? -->

**Command or area affected**
<!-- e.g. /remember, /search, storage format, README, new command -->

**Proposed behavior**
<!-- Describe what you'd like to happen. Be as specific as you can. -->

**Example**
<!-- Optional: show a mock slash command invocation, a sample changelog line, or a before/after of the memory file. -->

**Alternatives considered**
<!-- Have you tried a workaround? Is there another way to achieve this? -->

**Additional context**
<!-- Anything else — screenshots, links to related issues, etc. -->
